message:
test: add merkle index integration and symlink loop reproduction tests

Add two new test files that reproduce and validate specific edge cases:

- repro_merkle_index_integration.rs (120 lines): integration test verifying
  Merkle tree index consistency during concurrent scanner operations. Tests
  that the index correctly handles interleaved insert/delete cycles without
  corruption or stale entries.
- repro_symlink_loop.rs (42 lines): reproduction test for symlink loop
  detection in the filesystem scanner. Ensures the scanner correctly
  identifies and breaks out of circular symlink chains without infinite
  recursion or stack overflow.
- Update Cargo.lock for dependency alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
